title: Build checkpoint only advances on confirmed BlockPlacedEvent
description:
## Problem
The build checkpoint was advanced at **dispatch time** (fire-and-forget PlaceBlock "success"), not when the `BlockPlacedEvent` confirmation arrived from the adapter. Since PlaceBlock dispatches always "succeed" (they just send the command to the adapter), the checkpoint advanced past every position regardless of actual placement result. Failed placements (terrain collision, out of reach) were permanently skipped and never retried.

## Fix Applied
1. **Removed** checkpoint advancement from the dispatch success path in `AgentBackgroundService.DispatchActionsAsync` (the `if (action.Tool.Equals("PlaceBlock"...` block).
2. **Added** checkpoint advancement to the `BlockPlacedEvent` handler in `ProcessEventsAsync`. Uses new `AdvanceBuildCheckpoint("PlaceBlock")` method.
3. **Added** `_placeBlockContexts` dictionary to store blueprint ID + block index per correlationId at dispatch time, since `PendingAction` doesn't carry action context.
4. **Added** `_placeBlockContexts.Clear()` in all three places where `_correlatedActions.Clear()` is called (new goal, cancel, goal completion).

## Files Changed
- `WebUI.Blazor/AgentBackgroundService.cs`

## Priority: P0
